access_restriction.create.description: This event is triggered when an access restriction is created.

access_restriction.delete.description: This event is triggered when an access restriction is deleted.

access_restriction.update.description: This event is triggered when an access restriction is updated.

agent.activate.description: This event is triggered when an agent is paired.
agent.activate.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.activate_clone.description: This event is triggered when an agent clone is activated.

agent.clone_detected.description: This event is triggered when an agent clone is detected.
agent.clone_detected.remediation:
CRITICAL: VEN tampering or clone detected. This may indicate
the workload has been compromised. Immediately:
1. Isolate the workload from the network
2. Check for unauthorized processes or modifications
3. Review recent SSH/RDP access to the workload
4. Consider re-pairing the VEN after investigation

agent.deactivate.description: This event is triggered when an agent is unpaired.
agent.deactivate.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.generate_maintenance_token.description: This event is triggered when an agent generates a maintenance token.

agent.goodbye.description: This event is triggered when an agent is disconnected.
agent.goodbye.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.machine_identifier.description: This event is triggered when agent machine identifiers are updated.
agent.machine_identifier.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.refresh_token.description: This event is triggered when an agent refreshes its token.
agent.refresh_token.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.request_policy.description: This event is triggered when an agent requests a policy.

agent.request_upgrade.description: This event is triggered when a VEN upgrade is requested.

agent.service_not_available.description: This event is triggered when an agent reports a service is not running.

agent.suspend.description: This event is triggered when an agent is suspended.
agent.suspend.remediation:
VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check
the actor and verify against change management records.

agent.tampering.description: This event is triggered when an agent firewall is tampered.
agent.tampering.remediation:
CRITICAL: VEN tampering or clone detected. This may indicate
the workload has been compromised. Immediately:
1. Isolate the workload from the network
2. Check for unauthorized processes or modifications
3. Review recent SSH/RDP access to the workload
4. Consider re-pairing the VEN after investigation

agent.unsuspend.description: This event is triggered when an agent is unsuspended.

agent.update_interactive_users.description: This event is triggered when agent interactive users are updated.

agent.update_iptables_href.description: This event is triggered when an agent updates an existing iptables href.

agent.update_running_containers.description: This event is triggered when an agent updates existing containers.

agent.upgrade_successful.description: This event is triggered when an agent upgrade is successful.

agent.upload_existing_ip_table_rules.description: This event is triggered when agent existing IP tables are uploaded.

agent.upload_support_report.description: This event is triggered when an agent support report is uploaded.

agent_support_report_request.create.description: This event is triggered when an agent support report request is created.

agent_support_report_request.delete.description: Triggers when an agent support report request is deleted.

agents.clear_conditions.description: Triggers when a condition is cleared from a list of VENs.

VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during
deployment. Unexpected deactivation or unpair may indicate
workload decommissioning or administrative action. Check

VEN lifecycle event. Activation/deactivation is normal during

api_key.create.description: Triggers when an API key is created.
api_key.create.remediation:
API key lifecycle event. Verify the change was authorized.
Deleted keys may break integrations. New keys should follow
least-privilege principles. Check key expiration settings.

api_key.delete.description: Triggers when an API key is deleted.
api_key.delete.remediation:
API key lifecycle event. Verify the change was authorized.
Deleted keys may break integrations. New keys should follow
least-privilege principles. Check key expiration settings.

api_key.update.description: Triggers when an API key is updated.
api_key.update.remediation:
API key lifecycle event. Verify the change was authorized.
Deleted keys may break integrations. New keys should follow
least-privilege principles. Check key expiration settings.

auth_security_principal.create.description: Triggers when an RBAC auth security principal is created.

auth_security_principal.delete.description: Triggers when an RBAC auth security principal is deleted.

auth_security_principal.update.description: Triggers when an RBAC auth security principal is updated.

authentication_settings.update.description: Triggers when authentication settings are updated.
authentication_settings.update.remediation:
Authentication configuration changed. This is a high-impact
change that affects how all users authenticate. Verify:
1. Was this an authorized change?
2. Test login with the new configuration immediately
3. Have a rollback plan ready
4. Monitor for authentication failures after the change

cluster.create.description: Triggers when a PCE cluster is created.

cluster.delete.description: Triggers when a PCE cluster is deleted.

cluster.update.description: Triggers when a PCE cluster is updated.

container_cluster.create.description: Triggers when a container cluster is created.
container_cluster.create.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and
acknowledgement events are normal during cluster operations.
Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_cluster.delete.description: Triggers when a container cluster is deleted.
container_cluster.delete.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and
acknowledgement events are normal during cluster operations.
Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_cluster.kubernetes_workloads_b.description: Triggers when multiple Kubernetes workloads are created in bulk within a container cluster.
Triggers when multiple Kubernetes workloads are updated in bulk within a container cluster.

container_cluster.security_policy_acks.description: Triggers when a container cluster acknowledges the receipt of a security policy.
container_cluster.security_policy_acks.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and
acknowledgement events are normal during cluster operations.
Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_cluster.security_policy_applie.description: Triggers when a security policy is successfully applied to a container cluster.
container_cluster.security_policy_applie.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and
acknowledgement events are normal during cluster operations.
Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_cluster.update.description: Triggers when a container cluster is updated.
container_cluster.update.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and
acknowledgement events are normal during cluster operations.
Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_cluster.update_label_map.description: Triggers when the label mapping configuration for a container cluster is updated.

container_cluster.update_services.description: Triggers when container cluster services are updated from Kubelink.

container_workload.update.description: Triggers when a container workload is updated.

container_workload_profile.create.description: Triggers when a container workload profile is created.
container_workload_profile.create.remediation:
Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and

Profile changes affect how container workloads are segmented.

container_workload_profile.delete.description: Triggers when a container workload profile is deleted.

Container/Kubernetes cluster event. Policy application and

container_workload_profile.update.description: This event is triggered when a container workload profile is updated.
container_workload_profile.update.remediation:

database.temp_table_autocleanup_complete.description: This event is triggered when a database temporary table cleanup has completed.

database.temp_table_autocleanup_started.description: This event is triggered when a database temporary table cleanup has started.

deny_rule.create.description: This event is triggered when a deny rule is created.
deny_rule.create.remediation:
Security policy modification detected. Verify the change was
authorized and review the policy diff. Key checks:
1. Was this change in a change management ticket?
2. Does the change follow segmentation standards?
3. Are any deny rules being weakened?
4. Review the provisioned vs draft policy state.

deny_rule.delete.description: This event is triggered when a deny rule is deleted.
deny_rule.delete.remediation:
Security policy modification detected. Verify the change was
authorized and review the policy diff. Key checks:
1. Was this change in a change management ticket?
2. Does the change follow segmentation standards?
3. Are any deny rules being weakened?
4. Review the provisioned vs draft policy state.

deny_rule.update.description: This event is triggered when a deny rule is updated.
deny_rule.update.remediation:
Security policy modification detected. Verify the change was
authorized and review the policy diff. Key checks:
1. Was this change in a change management ticket?
2. Does the change follow segmentation standards?
3. Are any deny rules being weakened?
4. Review the provisioned vs draft policy state.

domain.create.description: This event is triggered when a domain is created.

domain.delete.description: This event is triggered when a domain is deleted.

domain.update.description: This event is triggered when a domain is updated.

enforcement_boundary.create.description: This event is triggered when an enforcement boundary is created.
enforcement_boundary.create.remediation:
Enforcement boundary changed. Boundaries define the scope of
policy enforcement. Verify the change doesn't expose
previously protected segments.

enforcement_boundary.delete.description: This event is triggered when an enforcement boundary is deleted.
enforcement_boundary.delete.remediation:
Enforcement boundary changed. Boundaries define the scope of
policy enforcement. Verify the change doesn't expose
previously protected segments.

enforcement_boundary.update.description: This event is triggered when an enforcement boundary is updated.
enforcement_boundary.update.remediation:
Enforcement boundary changed. Boundaries define the scope of
policy enforcement. Verify the change doesn't expose
previously protected segments.

event_settings.update.description: This event is triggered when event settings are updated.

firewall_settings.update.description: This event is triggered when global policy settings are updated.

group.create.description: This event is triggered when a group is created.

group.update.description: This event is triggered when a group is updated.

ip_list.create.description: This event is triggered when an IP list is created.
ip_list.create.remediation:
IP list modification. IP lists define network ranges in
policy rules. Changes may affect which external systems can
communicate with segmented workloads.

ip_list.delete.description: This event is triggered when an IP list is deleted.
ip_list.delete.remediation:
IP list modification. IP lists define network ranges in
policy rules. Changes may affect which external systems can
communicate with segmented workloads.

ip_list.update.description: This event is triggered when an IP list is updated.
ip_list.update.remediation:
IP list modification. IP lists define network ranges in
policy rules. Changes may affect which external systems can
communicate with segmented workloads.

ip_lists.delete.description: This event is triggered when IP lists are deleted.

policy rules. Changes may affect which external systems can
communicate with segmented workloads.

ip_tables_rule.create.description: This event is triggered when IP tables rules are created.

ip_tables_rule.delete.description: This event is triggered when IP tables rules are deleted.

ip_tables_rule.update.description: This event is triggered when IP tables rules are updated.

job.delete.description: This event is triggered when a job is deleted.

label.create.description: This event is triggered when a label is created.
label.create.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

label.delete.description: This event is triggered when a label is deleted.
label.delete.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

label.update.description: This event is triggered when a label is updated.
label.update.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

label_dimension.create.description: This event is triggered when a label dimension is created.

label_dimension.delete.description: This event is triggered when a label dimension is deleted.

label_dimension.update.description: This event is triggered when a label dimension is updated.

label_group.create.description: This event is triggered when a label group is created.
label_group.create.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

label_group.delete.description: This event is triggered when a label group is deleted.
label_group.delete.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

label_group.update.description: This event is triggered when a label group is updated.
label_group.update.remediation:

label_mapping_rule.create.description: This event is triggered when a label mapping rule is created.

label_mapping_rule.delete.description: This event is triggered when a label mapping rule is deleted.

label_mapping_rule.update.description: This event is triggered when a label mapping rule is updated.

labels.delete.description: This event is triggered when multiple labels are deleted.
labels.delete.remediation:
Label taxonomy change. Labels are the foundation of Illumio
segmentation policy. Deleted labels may orphan workloads from
policy. New labels should follow naming conventions.

ldap_config.create.description: This event is triggered when an LDAP configuration is created.
ldap_config.create.remediation:
Authentication configuration changed. This is a high-impact
change that affects how all users authenticate. Verify:
1. Was this an authorized change?
2. Test login with the new configuration immediately
3. Have a rollback plan ready
4. Monitor for authentication failures after the change

ldap_config.delete.description: This event is triggered when an LDAP configuration is deleted.
ldap_config.delete.remediation:
Authentication configuration changed. This is a high-impact
change that affects how all users authenticate. Verify:
1. Was this an authorized change?
2. Test login with the new configuration immediately
3. Have a rollback plan ready
4. Monitor for authentication failures after the change

ldap_config.update.description: This event is triggered when an LDAP configuration is updated.

Authentication configuration changed. This is a high-impact
change that affects how all users authenticate. Verify:
1. Was this an authorized change?
2. Test login with the new configuration immediately
3. Have a rollback plan ready
4. Monitor for authentication failures after the change

ldap_config.verify_connection.description: This event is triggered when an LDAP server connection is verified.

license.delete.description: This event is triggered when a license is deleted.

license.update.description: This event is triggered when a license is created or updated.

login_proxy_ldap_config.create.description: This event is triggered by an interservice call to the login service to create an LDAP configuration.

login_proxy_ldap_config.delete.description: This event is triggered by an interservice call to the login service to delete an LDAP configuration.

login_proxy_ldap_config.update.description: This event is triggered by an interservice call to the login service to update an LDAP configuration.

login_proxy_ldap_config.verify_connectio.description: This event is triggered by an interservice call to the login service to verify a connection to the LDAP server.

login_proxy_msp_tenants.create.description: This event is triggered when a managed service provider (MSP) tenant is created in the login proxy.

login_proxy_msp_tenants.delete.description: This event is triggered when a managed service provider (MSP) tenant is deleted from the login proxy.

login_proxy_msp_tenants.update.description: This event is triggered when a managed service provider (MSP) tenant is updated in the login proxy.

login_proxy_orgs.create.description: A login proxy organization is created.

login_proxy_orgs.delete.description: A login proxy organization is deleted.

login_proxy_orgs.update.description: A login proxy organization is updated.

network.create.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network.delete.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network.update.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_device.ack_enforcement_instructi.description: An enforcement instruction is applied to a network device.

network_device.assign_workload.description: An existing or new unmanaged workload is assigned to a network device.

network_device.create.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_device.delete.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_device.update.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_devices.ack_multi_enforcement_in.description: Enforcement instructions are applied to multiple network devices.

network_enforcement_node.activate.description: A network enforcement node is activated.
network_enforcement_node.activate.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_enforcement_node.clear_condition.description: Network enforcement node conditions are cleared.

network_enforcement_node.deactivate.description: A network enforcement node is deactivated.
network_enforcement_node.deactivate.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_enforcement_node.degraded.description: A network enforcement node enters a degraded state.
network_enforcement_node.degraded.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_enforcement_node.missed_heartbea.description: A network enforcement node misses its expected heartbeats.
network_enforcement_node.missed_heartbea.remediation:
Network infrastructure change. NEN degradation or missed
heartbeats may indicate connectivity issues. Device changes
should align with network change management.

network_enforcement_node.missed_heartbea.description: A system check for missed heartbeats from a network enforcement node is executed.

network_enforcement_node.network_devices.description: A workload is added to a network endpoint.

network_enforcement_node.policy_ack.description: A network enforcement node acknowledges a policy.

network_enforcement_node.request_policy.description: A network enforcement node requests a policy.

network_enforcement_node.update_status.description: This event is triggered when a network enforcement node reports that switches are not reachable.

network_enforcement_nodes.clear_conditio.description: This event is triggered when a condition is cleared from a list of network enforcement nodes.

nfc.activate.description: This event is triggered when a network function controller is created.

nfc.delete.description: This event is triggered when a network function controller is deleted.

nfc.update_discovered_virtual_servers.description: This event is triggered when network function controller virtual servers are discovered.

nfc.update_policy_status.description: This event is triggered when a network function controller policy status is reported or updated.

nfc.update_slb_state.description: This event is triggered when a network function controller server load balancer (SLB) state is updated.

org.create.description: This event is triggered when an organization is created.

org.recalc_rules.description: This event is triggered when rules for an organization are recalculated.

org.update.description: This event is triggered when organization information is updated.

pairing_profile.create.description: This event is triggered when a pairing profile is created.

pairing_profile.create_pairing_key.description: This event is triggered when a pairing key is created for a pairing profile.

pairing_profile.delete.description: This event is triggered when a pairing profile is deleted.

pairing_profile.delete_all_pairing_keys.description: This event is triggered when pairing keys are deleted from a pairing profile.

pairing_profile.update.description: This event is triggered when a pairing profile is updated.

pairing_profiles.delete.description: This event is triggered when multiple pairing profiles are deleted.

password_policy.create.description: This event is triggered when a password policy is created.

password_policy.delete.description: This event is triggered when a password policy is deleted.

password_policy.update.description: This event is triggered when a password policy is updated.

permission.create.description: This event is triggered when a role-based access control (RBAC) permission is created.

permission.delete.description: This event is triggered when an RBAC permission is deleted.

permission.update.description: This event is triggered when an RBAC permission is updated.

radius_config.create.description: This event is triggered when a RADIUS authentication configuration is created.
radius_config.create.remediation:
Authentication configuration changed. This is a high-impact
change that affects how all users authenticate. Verify:
1. Was this an authorized change?
2. Test login with the new configuration immediately
3. Have a rollback plan ready
4. Monitor for authentication failures after the change

radius_config.verify_shared_secret.description: A Login Proxy RADIUS configuration shared secret is verified.

request.authentication_failed.remediation:
Immediate action required. Review the source IP and username.
Multiple failures from the same IP may indicate brute force attack.
Check if the account is locked. Review API key expiration dates.

request.authorization_failed.remediation:
Immediate action required. Review the source IP and username.
Multiple failures from the same IP may indicate brute force attack.
Check if the account is locked. Review API key expiration dates.

request.internal_server_error.description: API request failed due to an internal server error.
request.internal_server_error.remediation:
PCE server error detected. Check PCE health status and logs.
Repeated errors may indicate infrastructure issues.
Contact Illumio support if errors persist.

request.service_unavailable.description: API request failed due to an unavailable service.
request.service_unavailable.remediation:
PCE server error detected. Check PCE health status and logs.
Repeated errors may indicate infrastructure issues.
Contact Illumio support if errors persist.

request.unknown_server_error.description: API request failed due to an unknown server error.
request.unknown_server_error.remediation:
PCE server error detected. Check PCE health status and logs.
Repeated errors may indicate infrastructure issues.
Contact Illumio support if errors persist.

rule_set.create.remediation:
Security policy modification detected. Verify the change was
authorized and review the policy diff. Key checks:
1. Was this change in a change management ticket?
2. Does the change follow segmentation standards?
3. Are any deny rules being weakened?
4. Review the provisioned vs draft policy state.

Deleted keys may break integrations. New keys should follow
least-privilege principles. Check key expiration settings.

service_account.update.remediation:
API key lifecycle event. Verify the change was authorized.
Deleted keys may break integrations. New keys should follow
least-privilege principles. Check key expiration settings.

syslog_destination.delete.description: This event is triggered when a syslog remote destination is deleted.

syslog_destination.update.description: This event is triggered when a syslog remote destination is updated.

system_task.agent_missed_heartbeats_chec.description: This event is triggered by a system task checking for agents that have missed heartbeats.
system_task.agent_missed_heartbeats_chec.remediation:
Automated system maintenance task. These are normal operations.
Agent offline/missed heartbeat checks may generate follow-up
events if agents are unreachable.

system_task.agent_missing_heartbeats_aft.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon when a VEN is missing its heartbeat after a software upgrade.

system_task.agent_offline_check.description: This event is triggered by a system task that marks agents as offline after they miss a specified number of heartbeats.
system_task.agent_offline_check.remediation:
Automated system maintenance task. These are normal operations.
Agent offline/missed heartbeat checks may generate follow-up
events if agents are unreachable.

system_task.agent_self_signed_certs_chec.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon performing a housekeeping check on VEN self-signed certificates.

system_task.agent_settings_invalidation_.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon checking for an invalidation error state in VEN settings.

system_task.agent_uninstall_timeout.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon evaluating the timeout limit for uninstalling a VEN.

system_task.clear_auth_recover_condition.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon clearing a VEN authentication recovery condition.

system_task.compute_policy_for_unmanaged.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon computing security policies for unmanaged workloads.
system_task.compute_policy_for_unmanaged.remediation:
Automated system maintenance task. These are normal operations.
Agent offline/missed heartbeat checks may generate follow-up
events if agents are unreachable.

system_task.delete_expired_service_accou.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon running an expiry sweep task to delete expired service accounts.

system_task.delete_old_cached_perspectiv.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon deleting old cached perspectives.

system_task.endpoint_offline_check.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon running a task to check for offline endpoints.

system_task.provision_container_cluster_.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon provisioning container cluster services.
system_task.provision_container_cluster_.remediation:
Automated system maintenance task. These are normal operations.
Agent offline/missed heartbeat checks may generate follow-up
events if agents are unreachable.

system_task.prune_old_log_events.description: This event is triggered when a system task successfully completes the pruning of old log events.
system_task.prune_old_log_events.remediation:
Automated system maintenance task. These are normal operations.
Agent offline/missed heartbeat checks may generate follow-up
events if agents are unreachable.

system_task.remove_stale_zone_subsets.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon when stale zone subnets are removed.

system_task.set_server_sync_check.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon running a SetServer synchronization task.

system_task.vacuum_deactivated_agent_and.description: This event is triggered by a system daemon running a vacuum task to clean up deactivated agents and deleted workloads.

traffic_collector_setting.create.description: This event is triggered when a new traffic collector setting is created.

traffic_collector_setting.delete.description: This event is triggered when an existing traffic collector setting is deleted.

traffic_collector_setting.update.description: This event is triggered when a traffic collector setting is updated.

trusted_proxy_ips.update.description: This event is triggered when trusted proxy IPs are either created or updated.

user.accept_invitation.description: This event is triggered when a user accepts an invitation to access the system.
user.accept_invitation.remediation:
User account change detected. Verify the change was authorized.
Check who made the change (created_by). Ensure MFA is enforced
for all administrative accounts.

user.authenticate.description: This event is triggered when a user is successfully authenticated.
user.authenticate.remediation:
Normal authentication activity. Monitor for unusual patterns:
logins at odd hours, from new IPs, or failed attempts preceding success.
